title: oenothera biennis var. rubricaulis
intro: Oenothera biennis var. rubricaulis, commonly known as the evening primrose, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its rich oil content, particularly in its seeds, which are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oenothera biennis var. rubricaulis include soothing skin irritations, alleviating symptoms of eczema and acne, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. The herbal preparations of evening primrose include oil extracts, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to support heart health and reduce inflammation.
